title: TechTimer (Previously known as XbowTimer)
description: Counts the number of frames your techs are.
body:
# TechTimer

A client-side timing tool for measuring **Xbows** (Crossbow Carts), **Instacarts** (Bow Carts), and **Anchors** at 60 frame locks.

## What is this?

In gamemodes like HTK Cart you usually xbow, xbow's require good mechanics and sometimes you wanna know how fast your xbows are. This modautomatically measures each sequence from the moment you place the rail to the moment the cart explodes, giving you an exact frame count so you can track and improve your consistency.
> ^^ applies for Crystal and LTK Cart

## Features

- **Real-time HUD**, displays your result in frames immediately after each shot (e.g. `12/60 (4t)`)
- **Dual measurement**, reports both 60fps frame count and game-tick-based frames side by side
- **Full history**, scrollable table of every recorded shot with date, server, and timing breakdown
- **ModMenu integration**, all settings accessible in-game

## Side effects

- **Realizing how slow your techs are**

## Who is this for?

Anyone who wants to measure and improve their consistency in fast mechanic sequences.

## Notes

- Client-side only. The mod works on any server
- Requires Fabric API
- 60fps reference frame (independent of your actual framerate)!
